lanes.title: Tool-defaults direct runtime parity
lanes.ownerAction: Fix product or harness before claiming the tool-defaults gate is trusted.

lanes.title: OpenClaw dynamic integration tools direct runtime parity
lanes.ownerAction: Investigate any hard failure as an OpenClaw dynamic integration or QA loading regression.

lanes.title: Tool-defaults searchable runtime parity
lanes.ownerAction: Keep as report-only until searchable/deferred tool modeling has no mock-only ambiguity.

lanes.title: First-hour 20-turn direct runtime parity
lanes.ownerAction: Triage row-by-row; do not file product bugs unless live/native proof reproduces.

lanes.title: Mock assistant-message token efficiency estimate
lanes.ownerAction: Fix labeling before trusting token-efficiency comparisons.

lanes.title: Mock fault-injection runtime parity
lanes.ownerAction: Treat failures as retry/recovery regressions unless evidence shows fixture drift.

lanes.title: Expanded curated JSONL replay
lanes.ownerAction: Inspect first drift turn and transcript class before filing any product issue.

lanes.title: Seeded confidence negative controls
lanes.ownerAction: Fix the harness before trusting any green parity result.
